description_long: This object is a compact, tactical shotgun with a streamlined, matte dark gray body and a slightly angular design. The main body is solid and blocky, with a short, cylindrical barrel protruding from the front, capped by a small muzzle. The stock is integrated and straight, blending smoothly into the receiver, while the grip is sharply angled and ergonomic, designed for a firm hold. The trigger is housed within a rounded guard, and a small red detail is visible near the rear, possibly indicating a safety or selector switch. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible external magazine or pump, suggesting a semi-automatic mechanism. The finish is consistent and smooth, with no visible texturing or embellishments.
description: A compact, matte dark gray tactical shotgun with a straight stock, ergonomic grip, and short barrel, featuring a minimalistic and streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the straight stock, angled grip, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow width of the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile of view 0, with the same visible features.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the red detail near the back, with the grip and trigger guard visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves or reinforcement
